prompt: Studio product shot of a premium unstructured black cotton dad hat (six-panel low-profile cap) on a neutral warm gray seamless background, slightly angled hero view. The orange AITX open-arms mark embroidered on the front panel. A small NVIDIA-green #76b900 stitched eyelet and a thin green accent on the back strap. Soft shadow. IMPORTANT LOGO RULES: The ONLY logo anywhere is the orange AITX open-arms mark (a friendly figure with open arms, AITX orange #ff4201, from the passed reference image). Do NOT render the NVIDIA logo, the NVIDIA eye/GPU icon, or any NVIDIA wordmark graphic. The word 'NVIDIA' may appear ONLY as very small, plain, neutral sans-serif text as a collaboration credit, set apart from the AITX mark (like a discreet tag or hem credit), never stylized as a brand logo and never combined with the AITX mark. NVIDIA green #76b900 appears only as a small accent detail; AITX orange leads.
